summary: Riverpod state management unit. Exposes reactive data or async results to the UI layer. Typically reads from a DAO or another provider and transforms the data. Providers: onboardingCompleteProvider.

Displays UI to the user. Watches one or more Riverpod providers to read reactive data, dispatches user actions back to providers, and composes reusable widgets. Defines: OnboardingScreen, _OnboardingScreenState, _WelcomePage.
responsibilities: Exposes methods: dispose, build, setState, setState, setState
